name: Stockade Gals Free Mode
description:
In Lyra, punishment is king. Harsh punishment of criminals is effective in keeping crime rates low, and the stockades provide both a message to would-be criminals, and relief to the law-abiding citizens of the realm.

Pick your poison. This bot will generate random women in the stockades for you to torment as you see fit. Just make sure you hear their stories, first!

I don't make radiant bots like this that generate random stuff on the fly, so feedback is welcome. Be sure to stay hydrated, while you're at it.

2025 update: The mods replaced the image with their cute-ass placeholder without letting me back it up, so it's gone forever now. Pray for sex.
creator: Story of Healing
